summary: Split-screen State of the Union excerpt. Trump speaks at the House rostrum on the left while a blue graphic panel on the right reads 'END. SANCTUARY. CITIES.' with a 'Law & Order / 2026 State of the Union' footer. The audio is the speech itself, which includes statements about ending sanctuary cities and penalizing officials who block removals. There is no music track.
notable_text: END. SANCTUARY. CITIES.; LAW & ORDER; 2026 STATE OF THE UNION; STATE of the UNION
